response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song as "REALITY FANTASY" by Hololive 3rd Generation based on the on-screen text and typical performance context for this group. Simplified the search string to "REALITY FANTASY Hololive 3rd Generation Japanese and English lyrics". Retrieved both the original lyrics and a translation from the search results. Broke the video into a performance scene and a concluding outro scene.
response.global_summary: A live performance video of the song "REALITY FANTASY" by the Japanese VTuber group Hololive 3rd Generation (Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, and Houshou Marine). The video consists of a single continuous performance of the song, with members of the group appearing in maid-themed costumes on a concert stage.

scenes.description: The song "REALITY FANTASY" is performed live on stage by the four members of Hololive 3rd Generation. On-screen text "hololive 3rd Generation Live" is prominently displayed.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
"HO LO LI VE" "FA N TA SY"
Adventure! Depart! Now! Challenge! Start! Now!
Adventure! Depart! Now! Challenge! Start! Now!

Even from my heart, jump jump, heart pounding
At the peak, jump jump!
Adventure! Depart! Now! Challenge! Start! Now!

Horizontal lines, far beyond
The new world is waiting, wait for me
Destiny, somehow, jumping over
To what lies beyond

Ah, Reality, Fantasy
Between the two
Dream, sing, soar high together
Ah, to a world that hasn't been seen yet
I'll take you along with me
The thing that connects everyone is in our hands
Now it's starting, Adventure! Depart! Now! Challenge! Start! Now!
Adventure! Depart! Now! Challenge! Start! Now!

Everyone's heart's determination, hold it up!
Ah, yes, the Kishidan group is gathered!
Adventure! Depart! Now! Challenge! Start! Now!

Aiming at the sun in our hearts, cutting through the wind
Shine even brighter
Adventure! Depart! Now! Challenge! Start! Now!

Glance and dream, at the zenith
If you hold it up, it's a surprise attack
Gather, protect this journey
Ah, Reality, Fantasy
Between the two
Raise it up, and welcome it, to Utopia
Ah, from each one's world
If you cross the border
The thing that connects everyone is in our hands
Now it's starting, Adventure! Depart! Now! Challenge! Start! Now!

Brightly, cheerfully, reform, ride over
HOLO! LIVE!
Love's liberation, whisper in my ears
HOLO! LIVE!
Kishidan and pride, carved into our hearts
HOLO! LIVE!
Myths and legends, whispered secrets
HOLO! LIVE!
Adventure! Depart! Now! Challenge! Start! Now!

Ah, Reality, Fantasy
Between the two
Dream, sing, soar high together
Ah, to a world that hasn't been seen yet
I'll take you along with me
The preparation is done, look!
The route has been taken over
The thing that connects everyone is in our hands
Now it's starting, Adventure! Depart! Now! Challenge! Start! Now!

scenes.description: Post-performance outro with members on screen and text display.
